samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/tags_1/sample_001/target.rs:7:14
  |
7 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |
  = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

error[E0369]: binary operation `==` cannot be applied to type `Option<&Box<TNode>>`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/tags_1/sample_001/target.rs:27:25
   |
27 |     if sp.left.as_ref() == sp.right.as_ref() {
   |        ---------------- ^^ ----------------- Option<&Box<TNode>>
   |        |
   |        Option<&Box<TNode>>
   |
note: an implementation of `PartialEq` might be missing for `TNode`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/tags_1/sample_001/target.rs:1:1
   |
 1 | struct TNode {
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ must implement `PartialEq`
help: consider annotating `TNode` with `#[derive(PartialEq)]`
   |
 1 + #[derive(PartialEq)]
 2 | struct TNode {
   |
